briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: To serve as the root package for common dedoc utilities, errors, and shared infrastructure used across all processing modules.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Scope\/ \: Package namespace initialization, shared exception re-export surface. \par \b Input\/ \: None \par \b Output\/ \: None (namespace package marker) \par \b Links\/ \: [READS_DATA_FROM(8): dedoc.common.exceptions] \par \b Invariants\/ \:

listitem.para: This is always a namespace package — no runtime logic. \par \b Rationale\/ \:

detaileddescription.para: Q: Why does this file exist empty? A: Python requires init.py for package discovery in legacy namespace packages. \par \b Changes\/ \:
LAST_CHANGE: [v1.0.0 — Semantic template markup added.] \par \b Module Map\/ \:
PKG 2[Namespace package marker] => common \par \b Use Cases\/ \:
